description: Default capability set for the desktop app. Grants the main window (and spec-020 multi-window children, label `alm-win-*`), plus the handoff-07 `splash` window, the ability to invoke the spec 002 lifecycle commands, create additional webview windows, set the engine zoom level (spec 055 Phase 4), close/show/focus windows (splash closing itself and revealing `main` once boot-ready fires), plus tauri-specta's built-in event registration.
